function.name: llm.swap_model
function.description: Swap the currently loaded LLM model in llama.cpp server

function.name: llm.server_status
function.description: Get the current status of the llama.cpp LLM server including loaded model and memory usage

function.name: llm.list_models
function.description: List all available LLM model files in the models directory

function.name: llm.load_lora
function.description: Load a LoRA adapter onto the currently running LLM

path.description: Path to the LoRA adapter file

function.name: llm.unload_lora
function.description: Unload the currently active LoRA adapter from the LLM

function.name: llm.list_loras
function.description: List all available LoRA adapter files for the LLM

function.name: llm.chat
function.description: Send a test chat message to the running LLM server and return the response
